auth.bare_model_ids_error: HTTP 400 — Invocation of model ID X with on-demand throughput isn't supported. Retry your request with the ID or ARN of an inference profile that contains this model.

url_encoding.rule: Model IDs containing colons MUST be URL-encoded (`%3A`). Newer models without datestamp suffix do not contain colons.

inferenceConfig.temperature: number — NOT supported on Opus 4 (Anthropic-side gate per #641; same on Bedrock-routed Opus 4.7)

toolConfig.tools: [{toolSpec: {name, description, inputSchema: {json: <JSON-Schema>}}}] — Bedrock requires the `inputSchema.json` wrapping (distinct from direct-Anthropic which takes the schema directly)

additionalModelRequestFields_thinking.type: 'adaptive' — Bedrock-specific. Direct-Anthropic 'enabled' + budget_tokens returns HTTP 400 'not supported for this model' on Bedrock-routed Opus 4.7
additionalModelRequestFields_thinking.adapter_translation: Adapter must translate caller-side thinking-trace requests into Bedrock adaptive form per FR-13
additionalModelRequestFields_thinking.output_config_effort: string — controls thinking depth; replaces budget_tokens

usage.cacheReadInputTokens: integer — prompt-cache; new vs direct Anthropic Bedrock surface

on_demand_not_supported.sentinel_message: Invocation of model ID X with on-demand throughput isn't supported
on_demand_not_supported.remediation: Use inference profile ID (us.* or global.*) instead of bare anthropic.* ID

invalid_model_identifier.sentinel_message: The provided model identifier is invalid
invalid_model_identifier.note: Bedrock returns 400 here, not 404 — error-classifier branches on body content

end_of_life.sentinel_message: This model version has reached the end of its life

blank_text_field.sentinel_message: The text field in the ContentBlock object at messages.X.content.X is blank

daily_quota.sentinel_pattern: body contains 'too many tokens per day' | 'daily' | 'quota'
daily_quota.note: Not probed (would consume quota); pattern documented from public reports

redaction_notes.account_id_redacted: All <acct> placeholders in source probes replace the operator's real AWS account ID, which is visible in the Bedrock API Key's base64 payload but redacted from every committed artifact
redaction_notes.timing_rounded: Latency values omitted from this fixture (would fingerprint specific accounts)
redaction_notes.model_arns: Foundation-model ARNs in inference-profiles probe contain account-scoped paths; not stored in this fixture
